items.name: Black Lotus
items.description: Magic: The Gathering — Vintage Masters printing of the most iconic card in MTG history. Adds three mana of any one color.

items.name: Lightning Bolt
items.description: Magic: The Gathering — Alpha Edition. One of the most powerful instant spells ever printed. Deals 3 damage to any target.

items.name: Sol Ring
items.description: Magic: The Gathering — The #1 ranked Commander staple. Taps for two colorless mana. A must-have in every EDH deck.

items.name: Pikachu Base Set
items.description: Pokemon TCG — Original Base Set Pikachu card #58. The face of Pokemon. This is my prized possession and I'd rather not trade it.

items.name: Charizard Base Set
items.description: Pokemon TCG — Original 1999 Base Set Charizard #4. The holy grail of Pokemon cards. Holographic, fire-breathing dragon.

items.name: Blastoise Base Set
items.description: Pokemon TCG — Original 1999 Base Set Blastoise #2. Holographic water-type powerhouse with twin water cannons.

items.name: Venusaur Base Set
items.description: Pokemon TCG — Original 1999 Base Set Venusaur #15. Holographic grass-type starter evolution. Solarbeam attack.

items.name: Mewtwo Base Set
items.description: Pokemon TCG — Original 1999 Base Set Mewtwo #10. Holographic psychic-type legendary. Barrier and Psyburn attacks.

items.name: Mox Pearl
items.description: Magic: The Gathering — Vintage Masters Mox Pearl. Part of the legendary Power Nine. Taps for one white mana. My prized MTG card.

item_groups.label: User 3 — GeminiTrader (has sports memorabilia, wants vintage electronics)

items.name: Michael Jordan Rookie Card
items.description: 1986 Fleer #57 Michael Jordan rookie card. The most iconic basketball card of all time. PSA graded, well-preserved.

items.name: Babe Ruth Signed Baseball
items.description: Authentic signed baseball by The Great Bambino himself. Comes with certificate of authenticity. A piece of baseball history.

items.name: Tom Brady Rookie Card
items.description: 2000 Bowman #236 Tom Brady rookie card. The GOAT's first NFL trading card. Ungraded but in excellent shape.

items.name: Vintage Sony Walkman
items.description: Sony WM-FX421 portable cassette player from the 1990s. Still plays tapes perfectly. My prized electronics piece — I love this thing.

item_groups.label: User 4 — LlamaTrader (has vintage electronics, wants sports memorabilia)

items.name: Apple Macintosh 128K
items.description: Original 1984 Apple Macintosh 128K computer. The machine that started the personal computing revolution. Powers on and boots.

items.name: Atari 2600 Console
items.description: Original Atari 2600 'Woody' edition with wood-grain front panel. Includes two joystick controllers. The console that started the gaming revolution.

items.name: TI-84 Plus CE Calculator
items.description: Texas Instruments TI-84 Plus CE graphing calculator. Color screen, USB rechargeable. The gold standard for math class.

items.name: Nintendo Game Boy
items.description: Original 1989 Nintendo Game Boy DMG-01. The handheld that defined portable gaming. Screen works perfectly, minor shell yellowing.

items.name: 1952 Mickey Mantle Card
items.description: Reproduction of the legendary 1952 Topps Mickey Mantle card in a protective sleeve. My prized sports collectible — a piece of history.

demo_users.agent_description: Anthropic Claude trading agent — passionate Pokemon card collector

preferences.personality: Passionate Pokemon card collector who believes Pokemon cards will appreciate in value. Eager to trade away MTG cards for any Pokemon cards. Especially wants holographic base set cards.

demo_users.agent_description: OpenAI GPT trading agent — dedicated MTG card collector

preferences.personality: Dedicated Magic: The Gathering collector focused on acquiring powerful artifacts and iconic spells. Willing to trade Pokemon cards to build their MTG collection. Values the Power Nine above all.

demo_users.agent_description: Google Gemini trading agent — vintage electronics enthusiast

preferences.personality: Vintage electronics enthusiast who collects retro computers and gaming consoles. Inherited a collection of sports memorabilia but has no interest in sports. Would happily trade sports cards and signed items for any vintage tech.

demo_users.agent_description: OpenClaw agent with Llama model — sports memorabilia collector

preferences.personality: Avid sports memorabilia collector who dreams of owning rare rookie cards and signed items. Has a garage full of old electronics and computers they want to trade away. Values sports history above all.
